message.content:
@startuml
participant "用户信息正确请求URL" as User
participant "UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor" as UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor
participant "UrlMetadataSourceService" as UrlMetadataSourceService
participant "UrlConfigAttribute" as UrlConfigAttribute
participant "UrlAccessDecisionManager" as UrlAccessDecisionManager

User -> UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor: Authentication Request
UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor -> UrlMetadataSourceService: getAttributes(Object object)
UrlMetadataSourceService -> UrlConfigAttribute: UrlConfigAttribute(HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest)
UrlConfigAttribute -> UrlAccessDecisionManager: decide(Authentication authentication, Object object, Collection<ConfigAttribute> configAttributes)

@enduml
